scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const base=process.env.MONITOR_SMOKE_URL||'http://127.0.0.1:4180'; const res=await fetch(base+'/health'); if(!res.ok){throw new Error('health_check_failed:'+res.status)} const json=await res.json(); if(!json?.status){throw new Error('missing_status')} console.log('health ok:', json.status)"
